summary: W878 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while projecting W847 selected-cochain direct-source data to W733 concrete leaves through W855, then reusing the W877 concrete-leaves selected-cochain stable ExactAt route. Product success remains false because the W847 selected-cochain direct-source inputs, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W878 moves the latest stable ExactAt boundary to W847 selected-cochain direct-source data, but the W847 concrete requirements are still not instantiated.

The W847 boundary still requires closed-map or closed-embedding exact inputs, including W721 localized-right-adjoint payload and W722 source-triangulation payload, plus the selected-cochain strictification theorem for MetrizableLCA.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block the two expanded W847 requirements: branch exact inputs and selected-cochain strictification for MetrizableLCA.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
